failures.description: The agent failed to include item_id 5312063289, which costs $195.15 and therefore is more than $194.56.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to list available Skateboard items with deck material=bamboo costing more than $194.56. The tool output at index 3 provided all required evidence. Four items satisfy the condition: 4293355847 ($200.80), 5312063289 ($195.15), 6956751343 ($217.06), and 8176740019 ($208.60). At index 4, the Executor omitted item_id 5312063289 despite it being present in the tool output and above the price threshold. This is an omission of relevant grounded information used to produce the final answer.
